name: Iso11783OPGetAttribute
title: Iso11783OPGetAttribute
syntax: long Iso11783OPGetAttribute( dword ecuHandle, dword objectID, dword attributeID );
description: The function returns a value of an object attribute from the local object pool. A Get Attribute command is not sent to the Virtual Terminal. The object must exist in the object pool and support the attribute ID.

parameters.name: ecuHandle
parameters.description: Handle of the ECU (must be created with Iso11783CreateECU)

return:
Integer value of the object.
If a value of 0 is returned, you can check with the function Iso11783GetLastError if the function succeeded.
